posts.title: How Sakana AI’s new technique solves the problems of long-context LLM tasks
posts.summary: RePo, Sakana AI’s new technique, solves the "needle in a haystack" problem by allowing LLMs to organize their own memory. The post How Sakana AI’s new technique solves the problems of long-context LLM tasks first appeared on TechTalks .
